# AnyVision Media
> South African AI consulting firm specialising in custom AI solutions, computer vision, NLP, and business automation for enterprises across Johannesburg, Cape Town, Durban, Pretoria, and beyond.

## Services
- [AI Strategy Consulting](https://www.anyvisionmedia.com/services/ai-strategy-consulting.html): Strategic AI roadmaps and readiness assessments for businesses
- [Custom AI Solutions](https://www.anyvisionmedia.com/services/custom-ai-solutions.html): Bespoke AI development tailored to business needs
- [AI Integration](https://www.anyvisionmedia.com/services/ai-integration.html): Seamless integration of AI into existing business workflows
- [Computer Vision](https://www.anyvisionmedia.com/services/computer-vision.html): Image and video analysis solutions for quality control, security, and automation
- [NLP & LLM Solutions](https://www.anyvisionmedia.com/services/nlp-llm-solutions.html): Natural language processing and large language model implementations
- [AI Training & Workshops](https://www.anyvisionmedia.com/services/ai-training.html): Team upskilling and AI literacy programmes

## Locations
- [Johannesburg](https://www.anyvisionmedia.com/ai-consulting-johannesburg.html): Gauteng headquarters
- [Cape Town](https://www.anyvisionmedia.com/ai-consulting-cape-town.html): Western Cape office
- [Durban](https://www.anyvisionmedia.com/ai-consulting-durban.html): KwaZulu-Natal office
- [Pretoria](https://www.anyvisionmedia.com/ai-consulting-pretoria.html): Tshwane office
- [Bloemfontein](https://www.anyvisionmedia.com/ai-consulting-bloemfontein.html): Free State office
- [Port Elizabeth](https://www.anyvisionmedia.com/ai-consulting-port-elizabeth.html): Eastern Cape office

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2024
- Founder: Ian Immelman
- Headquarters: Johannesburg, South Africa
- Contact: admin@anyvisionmedia.com
- Specialisation: AI consulting, workflow automation, computer vision, NLP/LLM solutions
- Industries served: Accounting, law, real estate, medical, recruitment, construction, retail, engineering, IT, manufacturing
- Proof point: Helped a Johannesburg accounting firm automate 15 hours/week of manual data entry

## Free Resources
- [Free AI Readiness Assessment](https://www.anyvisionmedia.com/free-ai-assessment.html): Complimentary 15-minute AI assessment for any business
